pages.title: MoonTAStik Overview
pages.purpose: Introduce the MoonTAStik project, its purpose as a collection of MoonScript components for Lunatik, and high-level architecture

pages.title: Architecture
pages.purpose: Explain the overall system architecture, showing how ipparse and hexdump components work together in the Lunatik environment

pages.title: ipparse Library
pages.purpose: Overview of the ipparse packet parsing library, its modular design and capabilities across network layers

pages.title: Core Utilities
pages.purpose: Document the core utility functions for binary/hex conversion, hexdump functionality, and basic data manipulation

pages.title: Functional Programming Utilities
pages.purpose: Explain the functional programming primitives, iterators, memoization, and utility functions provided by fun.moon

pages.title: Network Protocol Parsing
pages.purpose: Overview of the layered approach to network protocol parsing and how different layers interact

pages.title: Layer 2: Ethernet Protocol
pages.purpose: Document Ethernet frame parsing, packing, and MAC address utilities

pages.title: Layer 3: IP Processing
pages.purpose: Explain the unified IP interface that handles both IPv4 and IPv6 with automatic version detection

pages.title: IPv4 Protocol
pages.purpose: Detail IPv4 header parsing, packing, address conversion, and checksum calculation

pages.title: IPv6 Protocol
pages.purpose: Detail IPv6 header parsing, packing, address conversion, and key derivation features

pages.title: IPv4 Fragmentation Handling
pages.purpose: Explain the packet reassembly system for handling fragmented IPv4 packets

pages.title: Layer 4: Transport Protocols
pages.purpose: Overview of transport layer protocol support including TCP and UDP

pages.title: TCP Protocol
pages.purpose: Document TCP header parsing, packing, flag management, and object-oriented interface

pages.title: UDP Protocol
pages.purpose: Document UDP header parsing, packing, and length calculation

pages.title: Port Number Mappings
pages.purpose: Explain the service name mappings for TCP and UDP port numbers

pages.title: QUIC Protocol
pages.purpose: Document QUIC parsing, packing, and length calculation

pages.title: Layer 7: Application Protocols
pages.purpose: Overview of application layer protocol support including DNS and TLS

pages.title: DNS Protocol
pages.purpose: Comprehensive documentation of DNS message parsing, packing, label compression, and EDNS support

pages.title: TLS Protocol
pages.purpose: Document TLS record layer parsing, packing, and key derivation functions

pages.title: TLS Handshake Processing
pages.purpose: Explain TLS handshake message parsing, cipher suites, compression methods, and extensions

pages.title: TLS ClientHello Messages
pages.purpose: Detail ClientHello message structure, parsing, and packing functionality

pages.title: TLS Extensions
pages.purpose: Document TLS extension parsing and packing, including Server Name Indication (SNI)

pages.title: hexdump Tool
pages.purpose: Document the kernel-level packet inspection utility, its XDP and Netfilter integration, and packet dumping capabilities

pages.title: Build and Installation
pages.purpose: Explain the build system, MoonScript compilation, packaging, and installation procedures

pages.title: Examples and Usage
pages.purpose: Provide practical examples of using the library, including DNS parsing and TLS SNI extraction

pages.title: License
pages.purpose: Document the dual licensing approach with MIT and GPL licenses
